scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --reload-dir ../../packages --reload-dir ../../configs --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.macos:build: pnpm build:web && pnpm macos:build:sidecar && pnpm macos:build:penrose && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dir --arm64 && pnpm macos:sign && pnpm macos:verify
scripts.test:web-actions: node --experimental-strip-types --test apps/web/src/lib/*Actions.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/browserStorage.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/diagramPenroseSubstance.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/editorSubsectionDragControls.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/frontMatterLogoActions.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/initialStorageHydration.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/mathDelimiters.test.ts scripts.test:launcher: node --test scripts/mauth-launch-plan.test.mjs scripts/install-macos-launcher-copy.test.mjs scripts/mauth-runtime.test.mjs scripts/macos-ship-plan.test.mjs desktop/runtime.test.mjs desktop/updater.test.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm test:api && pnpm test:web-actions && pnpm test:plotly && pnpm test:launcher && pnpm build:web
scripts.format:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format app tests ../../packages/question-engine ../../packages/formatting-engine ../../packages/marking-engine
scripts.format:check:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format --check app tests ../../packages/question-engine ../../packages/formatting-engine ../../packages/marking-engine
scripts.lint:web: pnpm exec eslint apps/web packages/shared packages/diagram-plotly packages/diagram-penrose
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check app tests ../../packages/question-engine ../../packages/formatting-engine ../../packages/marking-engine
scripts.check: pnpm check:handoff && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm test
